title: Verify Loss Aversion Nudge: User accepts reminder instead of canceling
description: Tests the primary action on the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, ensuring it keeps the trial active and sets a reminder.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the target cohort.

steps.description: 3. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up ('Wait! Don't lose your free days.'), click the primary action 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder'.
4. Verify the pop-up closes and the user is returned to the Trial Corner.
5. Check the 'Remind me' toggle in the 'Manage Trial' section.

expected_result: The user's trial remains active. The 'Remind me' toggle is now enabled. The 'remind-me-clicked' event is triggered with 'cancel pop-up' as the page source.
